steps.title: Identify the two-part requirement
steps.content: The student needs to both define “Lazarus species” and provide a specific example. An effective response must address both goals, not just one.

steps.title: Apply the requirement to the choices
steps.content: Choice A accomplishes both goals by defining “Lazarus species” and providing the mountain pygmy possum as an example within a single sentence. The other three fail because they each omit a key component: B provides only an example, C provides only a fact, and D provides only a general definition. That matches choice A — A is correct.
